content.title: Strategic Finance For Growth
content.body: The Intersection of Strategy and Finance in the Pursuit of Growth

content.title: Stage 1 — Start-Up
content.body: You have been working on this idea for months. Maybe years.

content.title: Stage 2 — Growth
content.body: Your phone has not stopped ringing. Orders are coming in faster than you can fill them.

content.title: Stage 3 — Maturity
content.body: The champagne years are over. Your company has grown from a scrappy startup into a genuine market player, but the phone is not ringing as often as it used to.

content.title: Stage 4 — Decline and Renewal
content.body: The board meeting ended thirty minutes ago, but you are still sitting in your chair staring at the P&L.

content.title: The full playbook is on Amazon / KDP.
content.body: Built for lasting, generational prosperity — sovereignty over dependency.
